summary: Completed comprehensive testing of enhanced Interakt WhatsApp integration. All 19 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed including 4 tabs (Inbox, Templates, Analytics, Contact Sync), conversation interaction, and mode toggle functionality.

backend_api: GET /api/admin/whatsapp/analytics - returns conversation stats (total, ai_active, human_takeover, total_messages)
GET /api/admin/whatsapp/analytics - returns delivery stats (queued, sent, delivered, read, failed, template_messages, delivery_rate, read_rate)
POST /api/admin/whatsapp/send-template - makes API call to Interakt (returns 200 with Interakt response)
POST /api/admin/whatsapp/send-template - accepts all optional parameters (language_code, body_values, header_values, button_values)
POST /api/admin/whatsapp/sync-all-leads - syncs all leads to Interakt (returns synced, failed, total counts)
POST /api/admin/whatsapp/track-event - makes API call to Interakt Event API
POST /api/leads - with phone_whatsapp triggers background Interakt sync
frontend_ui: WhatsApp admin page has 4 tabs: Inbox, Templates, Analytics, Contact Sync
Tab navigation works correctly with data-testid attributes
Inbox tab shows conversation list with customer names, last messages, and status badges
Inbox tab shows 'AI BOT' or 'Human' mode badges on conversations
Analytics tab shows Conversations section with Total, AI Active, Human Takeover, Total Messages stats
Analytics tab shows Message Delivery section with Queued, Sent, Delivered, Read, Failed, Templates, Delivery Rate, Read Rate stats
Templates tab has phone selector dropdown (from conversations)
Templates tab has phone input field for manual entry
Templates tab has template code name input
Templates tab has language dropdown (English, Hindi, Telugu)
Templates tab has body variables input (comma-separated)
Templates tab has Send Template Message button
Templates tab shows helpful note about template approval
Contact Sync tab has Bulk Sync All Leads button
Contact Sync tab shows sync result after clicking (synced, failed, total)
Contact Sync tab shows 'How it works' explanation
Conversation detail view shows customer name and phone
Conversation detail view shows AI Bot Mode / Human Mode status
Conversation detail view shows message history with customer and bot messages
Conversation detail view has Take Over / Switch to AI button
Conversation detail view has reply input and send button

critical_code_review_comments: All new WhatsApp endpoints properly implement authentication via admin_required dependency
Interakt API integration is LIVE (not mocked) - template messages will fail if templates not created in Interakt dashboard
Background tasks (asyncio.create_task) used for Interakt sync on lead creation - non-blocking
wa_message_status collection properly tracks delivery status updates from webhook
Analytics endpoint aggregates data from both wa_conversations and wa_message_status collections
seed_data_creation: Test lead created with phone number for Interakt sync testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp integration enhanced with analytics, template messaging, contact sync, and event tracking. All endpoints tested and working. Interakt API is LIVE - template messages require templates to be created in Interakt dashboard first. Test conversations exist in wa_conversations collection. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_whatsapp_enhanced.py covers all new endpoints.

interakt_api_notes.template_messages: Will return success:false if template not created in Interakt dashboard - this is expected behavior
interakt_api_notes.contact_sync: Successfully syncs leads to Interakt Track API
interakt_api_notes.event_tracking: Successfully tracks events via Interakt Event API
interakt_api_notes.webhook_status: Handles message_sent, message_delivered, message_read, message_failed events
